title: Rise of Chinese dynasties
description: Test your knowledge on the Zhou, Qin, and Han dynasties!

assessment_items.question_content:
**Why did Emperor Qin Shi Huang order the adoption of a common written language?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Qin Shi Huang needed his subjects to be able to understand the laws and when they had disobeyed them.

choices.content: To make sure his laws could be understood by everyone
To make using another language a punishable offense
To facilitate trade among diverse parts of the empire

assessment_items.question_content:
**Why did Emperor Wu of Han create an imperial academy of letters?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: Emperor Wu's academy was not open to women.

choices.content: To make the Han dynasty competitive academically with other empires like Rome
To encourage young men and women to better themselves mentally
To educate young men so they would be ready to take on government jobs

assessment_items.question_content:
**What was the purpose of King Zheng of Qin State claiming the Mandate of Heaven?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: The idea behind the Mandate of Heaven was that the ruler had received the blessing of the gods in order to reign.

choices.content: To legitimize his claim to rule China as emperor through divine sanction
To place Daoism as the prevailing religion over Legalism and Confucianism
To justify the building of massive temples throughout the dynasty
